introSection: Racing Whippet was a Wooden Möbius loop roller coaster located at West View Park in West View, Pennsylvania, USA.

sections.title: History
sections.content: Racing Whippet opened in 1927 in West View Park. The coaster was a rare Möbius loop Racing Roller Coaster, where it was one continuous track (the split is the first turn after the drop) and the riders would end up in a different station from where they originally were at. The coaster would operate for 50 years, until the park closed in 1977, when the park would be converted into the present-day West View Park Plaza. The coaster was scrapped that year.

fullText:
Racing Whippet was a Wooden Möbius loop roller coaster located at West View Park in West View, Pennsylvania, USA.

Racing Whippet opened in 1927 in West View Park. The coaster was a rare Möbius loop Racing Roller Coaster, where it was one continuous track (the split is the first turn after the drop) and the riders would end up in a different station from where they originally were at. The coaster would operate for 50 years, until the park closed in 1977, when the park would be converted into the present-day West View Park Plaza. The coaster was scrapped that year.
